summary: Frontend-only E2E regression for Owner > Staff & Treatments tab. Logged in via OTP (mock) for phone 8511111593, then exercised full CRUD + archive flows for Treatments and Staff, verified MultiServicePicker excludes archived treatments, and ran regressions for Daily Book, Insights, and public /book. All 11 review-request scenarios passed.

minor.issue: Two HTTP 422 console errors observed on initial /owner/dashboard load (no visible UI impact). Source endpoint not identified in this run; recommend inspecting owner page boot calls (likely a default/optional param being sent empty).

action_items: Investigate the two 422 responses logged on Owner Dashboard initial load (non-blocking but noisy).
Update /app/memory/test_credentials.md to add the Owner WhatsApp OTP test phone (8511111593) since OTP is the documented auth path for the dashboard; current file only lists PIN 9999.
critical_code_review_comments: OwnerDashboard.jsx is now ~770 lines and contains 10+ inner components (StaffTreatmentsManager, MultiServicePicker, InsightsDashboard, OwnerCustomerDirectory, etc.). Recommend splitting each manager into its own file under /pages/owner/ for maintainability.
Review request mentions data-testid='owner-side-tab-staff', but actual implementation uses 'owner-tab-staff' (see TABS map + OwnerSideMenu). Align docs/tests on a single canonical testid.
StaffTreatmentsManager.saveService / saveStylist do not wrap axios calls in try/catch; a failing POST/PATCH will surface as an unhandled promise rejection with no user toast.
archiveService/archiveStylist use window.confirm; consider a styled confirm dialog for consistency with the rest of the design system.

ProfileInput passes type='number' as string-valued inputs; numeric inputs are stringly typed in form state and coerced only at save (Number(...))—OK but worth a Pydantic-style validation pass on the frontend before POST.
test_credentials: Owner OTP login: phone=8511111593, OTP from POST /api/login/request-otp { mock_otp }. Confirmed working at preview URL.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Treatment_X (archived end-state) and TEST_Stylist (archived end-state) via UI as part of the flows. Both remain in DB in archived state per archive-only design.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Staff & Treatments CRUD + archive flows verified via UI against live preview. Archived items correctly disappear from MultiServicePicker and from public /api/services (verified count drops from 10 -> 9 active). Daily Book and Insights tabs still render fine after navigating away. Public /book route requires customer OTP login (Sign in to book screen) before service list renders; archived-treatment exclusion was double-confirmed by direct /api/services curl. Test seed items left in archived state (TEST_Treatment_X, TEST_Stylist) — main agent may purge if desired.
rca of the issue: No issues blocked the review request. Minor 422s on dashboard boot are unrelated to Staff & Treatments and should be investigated separately.
